title: "SELECT SUM (:var * COL1 * COL2)" is not OK
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE B (COL1 INT, COL2 INT, COL3 FLOAT);
INSERT INTO B (COL1, COL2, COL3) VALUES (100, 200, 1.5);
INSERT INTO B (COL1, COL2, COL3) VALUES (NULL, 300, 2.5);
SELECT SUM(@var * COL1 * COL2) FROM B;
SELECT SUM(COALESCE(COL3, 0) * COL1) FROM B WHERE COL2 > 150;
key_bug_features: SUM with variable multiplication in SQL query
